title: Compressor Pre-Heating Requirement
summary: Before starting the chiller after a long power-off or for the first time, the compressor must be pre-heated for at least 8 hours (or 12 hours in low winter temperatures).

structured_payload.duration: ≥8 hours (≥12 hours in low winter temperatures)

evidence_quote: 已经长时间切断机组电源后开机或首次开机,必须先对压缩机进行预热,具体操作请见“机组调试及试运行”

title: Shutdown Sequence
summary: Upon shutdown, the compressor stops immediately, the fan stops after a 30-second delay, and the water pump stops after a 10-minute delay.
evidence_quote: 关机后压缩机会立即停机,风机延时30秒停机,水泵延时10分钟停止运行。

title: Auto Anti-Freeze Function Setting
summary: The automatic anti-freeze operation can be enabled or disabled via the display board setting. When enabled, it prevents water pipe freezing after shutdown.
evidence_quote: 在显示板中将“自动防冻运行”参数设置为“开”

title: Defrost Mode Selection
summary: The defrost mode can be set to intelligent or traditional via the address switch on the module controller. Switch position ON selects intelligent defrost mode.
evidence_quote: 第4位开关为智能化霜与传统化霜选择位,当开关拨到ON位置时为智能化霜模式,反之则为传统化霜模式

title: Compressor 1 High Pressure Protection
summary: Fault code indicating high pressure protection for compressor 1.
evidence_quote: 压缩机高压一

title: Compressor 2 High Pressure Protection
summary: Fault code indicating high pressure protection for compressor 2.
evidence_quote: 压缩机高压二

title: Compressor 1 Low Pressure Protection
summary: Fault code indicating low pressure protection for compressor 1.
evidence_quote: 压缩机低压一

title: Compressor 2 Low Pressure Protection
summary: Fault code indicating low pressure protection for compressor 2.
evidence_quote: 压缩机低压二

title: Compressor 1 Overload Protection
summary: Fault code indicating overload protection for compressor 1.
evidence_quote: 压缩机一过载

title: Compressor 2 Overload Protection
summary: Fault code indicating overload protection for compressor 2.
evidence_quote: 压缩机二过载

title: Water Flow Switch Protection
summary: Fault code indicating water flow switch protection.
evidence_quote: 水流开关

title: Fan 1 Overcurrent Protection
summary: Fault code indicating overcurrent protection for fan 1.
evidence_quote: 风机一过流

title: Fan 2 Overcurrent Protection
summary: Fault code indicating overcurrent protection for fan 2 (used in four-fan systems).
evidence_quote: 风机二过流

title: Inlet Water Temperature Sensor Protection
summary: Fault code indicating protection for the inlet water temperature sensor.
evidence_quote: 进水温感器

title: Outlet Water Temperature Sensor Protection
summary: Fault code indicating protection for the outlet water temperature sensor.
evidence_quote: 出水温感器

title: Defrost Temperature Sensor 1 Protection
summary: Fault code indicating protection for defrost temperature sensor 1.
evidence_quote: 化霜温感器一

title: Defrost Temperature Sensor 2 Protection
summary: Fault code indicating protection for defrost temperature sensor 2.
evidence_quote: 化霜温感器二

title: Anti-Freeze Temperature Sensor Protection
summary: Fault code indicating protection for the system evaporator anti-freeze temperature sensor.

structured_payload.fault_description: 系统蒸发器防冻温度传感器保护

evidence_quote: 防冻温感器

title: Reference Point Temperature Sensor Protection
summary: Fault code indicating protection for the system reference point temperature sensor.

structured_payload.fault_description: 系统参考点温度传感器保护

evidence_quote: 参考点温感器

title: Anti-Freeze/Anti-Overheat Temperature Sensor Protection
summary: Fault code indicating protection for the system evaporator anti-freeze/anti-overheat temperature sensor.

structured_payload.fault_description: 系统蒸发器防冻/防过热温度传感器保护

evidence_quote: 防冻/防过热温度

title: Compressor 1 Discharge High Temperature Protection
summary: Fault code indicating high discharge temperature protection for compressor 1.
evidence_quote: 排气高温一

title: Compressor 2 Discharge High Temperature Protection
summary: Fault code indicating high discharge temperature protection for compressor 2.
evidence_quote: 排气高温二

title: Communication Line Fault
summary: Fault code indicating a communication line fault.
evidence_quote: 通信线故障

title: Clock Chip Fault
summary: Fault code indicating a clock chip fault.
evidence_quote: 时钟芯片故障

title: Memory Chip Fault
summary: Fault code indicating a memory chip fault.
evidence_quote: 存储芯片故障

title: Module Address Switch Setting Warning
summary: The address switch settings must be made with the unit powered off. Adjusting the switch while powered on is strictly prohibited.

structured_payload.constraint: Set address switches only when unit is powered off

evidence_quote: 警告:地址开关的设定必须在机组断电情况下进行,机组通电情况下严禁拨动地址开关。

title: Power Control Cabinet Operation Sequence
summary: To power the unit, first close the main three-phase air switch Q in the power control cabinet, then close the individual module power switches Q1-Q8.

structured_payload.operation_step_1: Close main three-phase air switch Q
structured_payload.operation_step_2: Close individual module power switches Q1-Q8

evidence_quote: 先合上电源控制柜中总三相空气开关Q,再分别合上每个模块机组的分电源开关Q1…Q8,机组即已通电。

title: Display Board Remote Interface Address Setting
summary: For units with a remote interface, the display board's 4-bit DIP switch sets the hardware address (1-5 valid). The remote software recognizes addresses 1-5 as 'Unit 1' to 'Unit 5'.
evidence_quote: 四位拨码开关指示各个显示板(代表1~8个模块的显示板)的硬件地址(1~5有效),远程电脑主界面依次显示为“机组一、机组二、机组三、机组四、机组五”。拨码开关1-4位为二进制码,1为最低位,4位最高位。注意:目前远程监控软件只能识别硬件地址为1~5的显示板,其它设置均无法连接。

title: Control System Module Capacity
summary: The control system consists of one main module controller and up to seven sub-module controllers, controlling a total of one to eight chiller modules.
evidence_quote: 模块式风冷冷(热)水机组控制系统,是由一个主模块控制器和最多七个子模块控制器组成

title: Regular Electrical Inspection
summary: Regularly check electrical wiring for looseness and tighten if necessary. Regularly check the reliability of electrical components and replace failed or unreliable ones promptly.

structured_payload.procedure_step_1: Check electrical wiring for looseness and tighten
structured_payload.procedure_step_2: Check reliability of electrical components and replace failed ones

evidence_quote: 定期检查电气接线有无松动现象,如有要及时紧固。定期检查电气器件的可靠性,应对失效及不可靠的器件及时更换。

title: Water System Flushing Requirement
summary: Before commissioning, the water system must be flushed, drained, and purged to ensure water flow and pressure meet requirements.

structured_payload.pre_commissioning_step: Flush, drain, and purge water system

evidence_quote: 根据《使用安装说明书》要求,对水系统进行冲刷排污排空,确认水流、水压等符合要求。

title: Manual Start/Stop via Display Board
summary: In non-debug state, the unit can be started/stopped manually via the display board's start/stop button (press for 3 seconds). Manual mode takes priority over timer mode.

structured_payload.start_action: Press start/stop button for 3s in OFF state
structured_payload.stop_action: Press start/stop button for 3s in ON state

evidence_quote: 手动开机:在关机状态下,按一下(3秒)开机。手动关机:在开机状态下,按一下(3秒)关机。手动模式优先于定时模式。

title: Timer Mode Setting
summary: The unit can be set to timer mode for automatic on/off based on weekly schedules. Each day can have independent on/off times and enable/disable status.
evidence_quote: 定时时间设定:星期X,定时开:XX时XX分 [√],定时关:XX时XX分 [√]

title: Operation Mode Setting
summary: The operation mode (cooling or heating) can be set via the display board, but only for heat pump models and only when the unit is off.

structured_payload.constraint: Only for heat pump models, set only when unit is OFF

evidence_quote: 运行模式在制冷模式和制热模式之间切换,只有热泵型模块机才有该功能,且只能在关机状态下设置。

title: Auxiliary Electric Heater Control
summary: The auxiliary electric heater can be enabled or disabled via the display board setting. It is only available in heating mode.
evidence_quote: 辅热打开 [√]

title: Backlight Always-On Setting
summary: The display board backlight can be set to remain always on via the user settings menu.
evidence_quote: 背光常开 [√]

title: Fault Query via Display Board
summary: Fault status can be viewed for each module via the display board's 'Fault Query' menu, showing the last fault and current fault codes.
evidence_quote: 用于查看系统的故障状态。选择故障查询按确定键进入。屏幕显示如下图所示:上一次故障 XX,当前故障 XX

title: Temperature Point Viewing
summary: Various temperature points (outlet water, inlet water, anti-freeze, reference point, defrost) can be viewed for each module via the display board.
evidence_quote: 用于查看各温度点的温度。选择温度查看按确定键进入。屏幕显示如下图所示:出水温度 XX℃,进水温度 XX℃,防冻/防过热温度 XX℃,参考点温度 XX℃

title: Component Status Viewing
summary: The on/off status of compressors, fans, and four-way valves can be viewed for each module via the display board.
evidence_quote: 用于查看各个电机的开关有无状态。选择状态查看按确定键进入。屏幕显示如下图所示:压缩机一 [开/关],压缩机二 [开/关],风机一 [开/关],风机二 [开/关]

title: Warning Against Shorting Protection Circuits
summary: Do not short-circuit lines that require protection devices, as this may cause faults.

structured_payload.warning: Do not short protection device circuits

evidence_quote: 警告:不要把需要接保护装置的线路短接,否则可能引起故障。

title: Water Pump Control During Water System Testing
summary: During water system testing before commissioning, the water pump can be temporarily powered by directly wiring its contactor control circuit, not through the main controller.

structured_payload.guidance: Temporarily wire pump contactor for water system testing
structured_payload.warning: Do not start pump via main unit before water system is adjusted

evidence_quote: 由于水泵由机组主模块控制器控制,在进行水系统运行时,可临时接线使水泵交流接触器控制回路通电,以使水泵运转。警告:在水系统未调整好以前,禁止通过主机来开水泵。

title: Anti-Freeze/Anti-Overheat Temperature Setting
summary: The anti-freeze/anti-overheat temperature threshold can be set via the display board's parameter setting menu (requires password).
evidence_quote: 防冻/防过热温度XX

title: Forced Component Operation (Debug)
summary: For debugging, individual compressors, fans, and four-way valves on any module can be forced on/off via the 'Debug Function' menu, which requires a password.
evidence_quote: 可以对任一台单元模块的压缩机、风机和四通阀单独进行强制启停。用户决不可使用这些功能,如要使用必须在调试人员指导下进行,以免发生事故。此功能操作必须凭密码进入。

title: Temperature Offset Setting
summary: Temperature offsets for the main and sub-modules can be set via the display board during commissioning.
evidence_quote: 设定主、子模块温度偏移量

title: Power Supply Recommendation for Anti-Freeze
summary: After shutdown, it is recommended not to disconnect the unit's power switches to allow the compressor to continue heating and enable automatic anti-freeze operation in cold weather.

structured_payload.guidance: Keep unit powered after shutdown for anti-freeze
structured_payload.prerequisite: Set 'Auto Anti-Freeze' to ON in display board

evidence_quote: 停止运转后,日常运行时,建议不必断开机组电源控制柜中的分电源开关和总电源开关,这样可以保证停机后压缩机自动进行加热,在寒冷的冬天更应该保持压缩机停机后一直加热。这样还可使机组可以进行自动防冻运行,以防水管冻裂。(前提是在显示板中将“自动防冻运行”参数设置为“开”)

title: Display Board Idle Timeout
summary: If no operation is performed on the display board for 10 minutes, it automatically returns to the default home menu.
evidence_quote: 在进入菜单项后,如果10分钟未对显示板进行任何操作,自动回到上面的默认主页菜单(即主页)。

title: Phase Sequence Requirement for Power Wiring
summary: The phase sequence for the power line connections must be consistent.

structured_payload.constraint: Consistent phase sequence for power wiring

evidence_quote: 本机组在动力线的连接上要求相序必须一致。

title: Water Flow Switch Wiring
summary: The water flow switch wires (user-supplied) connect to terminals 34 and 35 on the main module. All modules must be interconnected via these terminals for flow switch interlock.
evidence_quote: 将水流开关引线(用户自备)接至主模块的34、35接线端子上,并用一根双芯信号线(用户自备)把各模块的34、35接线端子依次并接起来,使各模块实现水流开关连锁。

title: Water Pump Control Wiring
summary: The water pump AC contactor control wires connect to terminals N and 1' on the main module.
evidence_quote: 将水泵交流接触器的控制线连接在主模块的N、1'接线端子上。

title: Auxiliary Electric Heater Control Wiring
summary: The control wires for auxiliary electric heater 1 and 2 connect to main module terminals N-8 and N-11 respectively.
evidence_quote: 将辅助电加热1和辅助电加热2的交流接触器控制线分别接到主模块的N、8和N、11接线端子上。

title: Module Address Switch Configuration
summary: The first three bits of the address switch on each module controller set it as main or sub-module (1-7). The fourth bit selects intelligent vs. traditional defrost.
evidence_quote: 模块机组地址开关设定如下图(第1、2、3拨位开关为主、子模块设定开关,第4位开关为智能化霜与传统化霜选择位)

title: Controlled Objects per Module
summary: Each module controller controls: two compressors, two four-way valves (for heat pump), and two (or four) condenser fans. The main module controller also controls one water pump and two auxiliary electric heaters.
evidence_quote: 每个模块控制器控制对象包括:二台压缩机、二个四通阀(热泵)、二(四)台冷凝风机;主模块控制器还可控制一台水泵和两个辅助电加热器。

title: Emergency Stop Switch Usage
summary: The emergency stop switch on the electrical control box door is for maintenance, commissioning, or emergency shutdown only. It is not for routine use.
evidence_quote: 电控箱门上的急停开关用在机组维修、调试或紧急情况下的关机,平时一般不使用。

title: Parameter Modification Warning
summary: Users must not arbitrarily adjust set parameters on site.
evidence_quote: 在现场不要任意调节设定参数。
